meaning: adj.无关的,题外的,边远的,偏僻的
examples: Tourists can visit outlying areas like the Napa Valley Wine Country.
Many are housebound because of inadequate public transport in most outlying suburbs.
The outlying villages were formally annexed by the town last year.
But already Russia's outlying areas are running themselves with less and less say-so from the centre.
Debates over literary forms or outlying heroics are completely worthless when it comes to witness.
